name: Doll Designer Game
description: Welcome to Doll Designer Game, a creative and fun fashion design game where your imagination brings beautiful dolls to life! Get ready to design, dress up, and customize cute dolls using stylish outfits, accessories, and creative combinations. In Doll Designer Game, your goal is to become a top doll designer. Choose different hairstyles, dresses, shoes, makeup, and accessories to create stunning looks. Every doll is a new opportunity to show your fashion sense and creativity.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
